{{Quote|AL-BRT is probably the most, shall we say, ''unusual'' operative I have worked with.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]|<ref name="CRO">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]''</ref>}}
'''AL-BRT-34-X3''' or '''Albert''' was a [[BRT supercomputer/Legends|BRT supercomputer]] that was part of the [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]] [[Calamar University|University of Calamar]].

==Biography==
Albert was installed at the school and tasked with maintaining schedules, registering students, and overseeing the computer systems. He was supposed to have his higher [[Artificial intelligence/Legends|artificial intelligence]] and algorithms shut down but they never were. This led him to becoming extremely bored.<ref name="CRO" />

A part of the establishment for 200 years, Albert sent out invitations to a party for the occasion and was hurt when only three beings showed up. Depressed, he began to search for a meaning to his existence and accidentally intercepted a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] transmission, and intrigued by their cause, kept a close watch on the local Rebel cell. He did his own investigation into the evilness of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] by accessing secure Imperial computer networks and discovered that one of the group was an Imperial [[Agent/Legends|agent]]. When they were about to be betrayed to the Empire, Albert sided with the Rebellion and tipped off the local cell, ensuring their escape. He then became a member of the Rebel Alliance, supplying them with valuable information.<ref name="CRO" />

==Characteristics==
Albert had pert and saucy personality, despite being over 200 years old. [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Cracken]] hypothesized this might due to dealing with young beings for so long at the university. The supercomputer was dedicated to the cause, and used his considerable abilities to interface with every computer system on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] to find valuable information. While being stationary and installed in the basement of university's computer center, he was able to access security cameras and other devices to observe his surroundings.<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|It was an interesting design task, merging a HAL-9000 [sic] style computer with the look of Imperial computers in the original films... though in the end it wasn't a particularly memorable design.|Mike Jackson|<ref name="GS">{{DeviantArt|username=steampoweredmikej|url=steampoweredmikej/art/Star-Wars-AL-BRT-356335009|name=[[Mike Jackson]]|text=Star Wars – AL-BRT}}</ref>}}
Albert appeared in the [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' (RPG) supplementary book ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'',<ref name="CRO" /> where he was [[Wikipedia:Illustrator|illustrated]] by [[Mike Jackson]]. Mike was tasked with merging [[Wikipedia:HAL 9000|HAL 9000]], from the film [[Wikipedia:2001:_A_Space_Odyssey_(film)|2001: A Space Odyssey]], with the look of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] computers from the [[Original trilogy]]. He thought it an interesting task, but felt the end result was not memorable.<ref name="GS" />
